profile: Frontend developer with hl{nearly 3 years} of production experience — built a real-time B2B parking management platform and a transaction system used by hl{external partner banks}. Completed an MSc in Computer Science at the University of Lincoln (hl{Distinction}). Works across React with hl{React Router} and hl{React Query}; experienced in hl{Redux} for global state, hardware API integration, and diagnosing cross-browser and performance issues in live environments.

responsibilities: Built the operator dashboard for a B2B parking management platform serving hl{6 sites} — structured as an independent hl{micro-frontend} module to decouple deployments and enable the team to release without cross-team coordination.
Integrated the frontend with hl{hardware APIs} for automated entry and exit machines — handling real-time polling and async state to keep the operator UI synchronised with physical machine events.
Added hl{Jest and Vitest} coverage to previously untested core modules — establishing a regression baseline that caught hardware API edge cases before deployment.
Built cross-platform mobile views using hl{React Native} for on-site operators, and implemented multi-language support via React-i18next.
Used AI tooling to handle boilerplate and repetitive UI code — shifting focus to hl{architectural decisions and code review}, boosting personal delivery speed by hl{70%}.

projects.name: VETC Smart Parking
projects.description: B2B parking management platform serving multiple partner sites
responsibilities: Web dashboard for B2B partners (apartment complexes, commercial sites) to monitor parking space availability, manage automated entry/exit machines, and review transaction history across sites.
Companion mobile app for on-site operators with real-time gate status and transaction management from the parking floor.
Multi-language support serving operator teams across different partner locations.

Built and maintained the transaction dashboards, data entry workflows, and real-time financial views on a hl{production banking platform} used by hl{external partner banks} — owning the operator-facing frontend from initial build through to live support.
Designed and built the React component library hl{from scratch} using Atomic Design — establishing the shared UI foundation used across all product areas of the banking platform.

Led cross-browser compatibility and performance optimisation across the platform — diagnosing rendering inconsistencies, applying hl{lazy loading} to reduce initial bundle weight, and resolving regressions that affected reliability for operator workflows handling live financial data.

Integrated the frontend with hl{RESTful APIs} end-to-end — defining interface contracts with backend teams and implementing hl{input validation, loading states, error notifications, and retry logic} to ensure consistent, reliable data delivery across all financial views.

Implemented hl{real-time data polling} across the transaction dashboard using hl{React Query} — configuring refetch intervals and stale-time strategies to keep financial data live while minimising redundant network requests.

Developed the kiosk UI for KienLong Bank's hl{Smart Teller Machine} using hl{React and Electron} — building self-service flows for customer account registration, cash deposit, and cash withdrawal, plus a hl{video call} feature connecting customers with remote bank operators.

projects.name: KienLong Bank CMS
projects.description: Internal transaction management platform for KienLong Bank operators
responsibilities: Operator-facing platform for KienLong Bank staff to view, monitor, and manage client transactions in real time.
Live system monitoring with frontend error detection and an incident response workflow to maintain uninterrupted bank operations.
Companion employee management portal supporting internal staff administration alongside the core transaction CMS.

projects.name: KienLong Bank STM
projects.description: Desktop kiosk UI for KienLong Bank's Smart Teller Machine — self-service banking terminal deployed on physical STM hardware for customer-facing transactions.
responsibilities: Built the kiosk interface using React and Electron — packaging the web frontend as a standalone desktop application running directly on the STM hardware.
Implemented self-service transaction flows for customer account registration, cash deposit, and cash withdrawal — guiding users step-by-step through each operation on the touchscreen.
Integrated a live video call feature connecting customers at the machine with a remote bank operator for assisted transactions and real-time identity verification.
Used MUI to build a touch-optimised, accessible interface suited to kiosk interaction patterns on the machine's embedded display.
Communicated with backend services via hl{gRPC and Protobuf} — handling typed, binary-encoded messaging between the kiosk frontend and the bank's transaction processing services.

personal_projects.name: Rex Movie
personal_projects.subtitle: github.com/chauminhquang10/Rex-Movie
personal_projects.description: Personal project — full-stack Netflix-style streaming platform with real-time AI chatbox, subscription and payment system, and separate user and developer access tiers.
responsibilities: Built the full stack using hl{React.js}, hl{Node.js}, hl{MongoDB}, and hl{Firebase} — RESTful API backend with Material UI and Tailwind CSS on the frontend.

Implemented server-side hl{pagination, sorting, and filtering} on MongoDB collections — designing query logic and index-aware data retrieval to maintain consistent response times as the dataset grows.
Integrated a hl{Facebook chatbox} for user support and a hl{WebSocket} direct messaging channel for real-time admin communication.
Implemented a hl{Stripe} subscription and payment system with separate user and developer tiers — handling plan management, billing flows, and role-based access control.

personal_projects.name: L.I.V.E
personal_projects.subtitle: github.com/RiverO2442/L.I.V.E
personal_projects.description: Full-stack web application for gamified diabetes education — MSc Computer Science project, University of Lincoln. Sole owner from design to production deployment.
responsibilities: Took hl{full ownership from design to production}: architected the system using hl{Atomic Design}, built the frontend (React/Vite/Tailwind/shadcn) and backend (FastAPI/MongoDB), and deployed to Microsoft Azure.
Built to hl{WCAG 2.1 AA} accessibility standards throughout — ensuring full compliance for keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and colour contrast.
Automated the build and deployment pipeline using hl{Docker and GitHub Actions}, enabling reliable, repeatable deployments to Azure from day one.

Implemented hl{JWT-based authentication} with role-based access control, hl{CORS configuration}, and a guest user flow — securing API access while allowing unauthenticated users to explore core features without registration.
